textByHash.d7f8512ae1a418534d7f8e9b39d76027d04b4e44: Greetings! Are you in need of refreshment?
textByHash.2ec75f4b441d3586beaf7f662c6642f14cee91b0: A strong cup of tea? What do you mean?
textByHash.8c98b44ffad4be45afacd462b590a029d13a10bf: Ah, well why didn't you say that? Between you and me, Herbert's strong cups of tea are actually just my regular cups of tea, but if it makes him happy...
textByHash.713959dfc4ed81fd34de2868ca7fe7bc6ffe4a70: For Herbert? I already gave you one for him.
textByHash.4671ef3d7a103370391371119e59ea5543ba0681: Hmm... alright, but I can't keep making these for free you know.
textByHash.2acace2bd107f7aa574f6921c980b7cd12256fcc: Only the most delicious infusion of the leaves of the tea plant. Grown in the exotic regions of this world. Buy yourself a cup !
textByHash.d9925b89ebeee9648c56e39893a2a4c07d9c3ed8: Well, if you're sure. You know where to come if you do!
textByHash.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHash.bb8a164a3321aa6f8a12fe948ec2e940b594a61a: You're the one who stole something from me!
